# Special Algorithms → Demapper

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Special Algorithms → Demapper

Demapper

Instruction Type and Width      Instruction description
                                Performs linear piece wise estimation on source, according to
                                defined modulation. The multiplicand and addend are obtained
                                from a fixed look-up table. The source is a 16-bit complex signed
Vector Demapper
                                number (16-bit real and 16-bit imaginary). The result is 16-bit
                                wide or 20-bit wide signed number, determined by the vector
                                register type.
